title: Colossus
description: Vanilla-compatible QoL & adventure based modpack. Also the main modpack used in the WLS Vanilla server.
body:
## Colossus Modpack
Vanilla-compatible QoL & adventure based modpack. Also the main modpack used in the WLS Vanilla server.
##

<summary>Included Mods</summary>
  
- _To be written_

</details>

<details>

- [Climbable Chains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/climbable-chains)
- [End Fishing](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gm4-end-fishing)
- [Horses Genetic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horses-genetic)
- [KawaMood's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack)

- [SGrave](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sgrave)
- [Shapeless Portals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gm4-shapeless-portals)
  
</details>

<details>

- [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
